briefdescription.para: This function sets the DMA source of type XSecure_SssSrc based on the provided DMA device ID.

parameterdescription.para: DMA source is updated into the pointer.

listitem.para: XST_SUCCESS if DMA ID is correct

memberdef.argsstring: (XSecure_Sss *InstancePtr, XSecure_SssSrc Resource, XSecure_SssSrc InputSrc, XSecure_SssSrc OutputSrc)
memberdef.name: XSecure_SssCfg

briefdescription.para: This function configures the secure stream switch.

parameterdescription.para: Resource for which input and output paths to be configured.
Input source to be selected for the resource.
Output source to be selected for the resource.

simplesect.para:
- XST_SUCCESS - on successful configuration of the switch
XST_FAILURE - on unsuccessful configuration of the switch
Resource, InputSrc, OutputSrc are of type XSecure_SssSrc.

briefdescription.para: This function initializes the secure stream switch instance.
This function configures the secure stream switch for AES engine.

parameterdescription.para: Input DMA to be selected for AES engine.
Output DMA to be selected for AES engine.

simplesect.para:
- XST_SUCCESS - on successful configuration of the switch
XST_FAILURE - on failure to configure switch
InputSrc, OutputSrc are of type XSecure_SssSrc.

briefdescription.para: This function configures the secure stream switch for SHA hardware engine.

parameterdescription.para: Device ID of DMA which is to be used as an input to the SHA engine.

simplesect.para:
- XST_SUCCESS - on successful configuration of the switch.
XST_FAILURE - on failure to configure switch

briefdescription.para: This function configures secure stream switch to set DMA in loop back mode.

simplesect.para:
- XST_SUCCESS - on successful configuration of the switch.
XST_FAILURE - on failure to configure switch

briefdescription.para: This file contains functions for SSS switch configurations.

para.preformatted:
Ver Who Date Changes
4.2 har 03/26/20 Initial release 4.5 bsv 04/01/21 Added API to set SSS CFG register to PCAP 4.6 am 09/17/21 Resolved compiler warnings 4.7 am 11/26/21 Resolved doxygen warning
